# Strait

> Open-source job orchestration platform. Schedule jobs, build workflow DAGs, manage retries, and monitor runs — all from one dashboard.

Strait handles the hard parts of background job execution: scheduling, retries with exponential backoff, dependency graphs, concurrency limits, and real-time monitoring. One API, five SDKs, zero vendor lock-in.

Website: https://strait.dev
App: https://app.strait.dev
Docs: https://docs.strait.dev

## Why Strait

- **No more lost jobs.** Every execution follows a 13-state finite state machine. You know exactly where each run is at all times.
- **Retries that work.** Exponential backoff, fixed delays, custom sequences, and a dead letter queue for runs that exhaust all attempts.
- **Workflows, not scripts.** Define multi-step DAGs with job steps, approval gates, sub-workflows, event waits, and sleep delays.
- **Language-agnostic.** TypeScript, Python, Go, Ruby, and Rust SDKs with identical architecture. Define jobs in your language, run them anywhere.
- **Self-hosted or managed.** Deploy on your infrastructure with PostgreSQL and optional Redis — or use the managed platform at strait.dev.

## Key Features

1. **Job orchestration** — Durable, retriable units of work with endpoint URLs, cron scheduling, concurrency limits, and webhook notifications.
2. **Workflow DAGs** — Multi-step pipelines with five step types and dependency graphs validated with topological sort.
3. **13-state FSM** — Deterministic run lifecycle from queued to completed with 14 transition events.
4. **Event triggers** — Pub/sub event routing with key-based and prefix-based matching.
5. **Atomic deployments** — Create, finalize, promote, and rollback job versions without downtime.
6. **Real-time dashboard** — Monitor jobs, runs, workflows, schedules, logs, events, and webhooks.
7. **API keys and RBAC** — Granular scopes, role-based access control, and audit logging.
8. **186 API endpoints** — 19 domain services covering every aspect of job orchestration.

## SDKs

- [TypeScript](https://docs.strait.dev/sdks/typescript): Effect and Promise APIs for Node.js
- [Python](https://docs.strait.dev/sdks/python): Sync and async clients for Python 3.11+
- [Go](https://docs.strait.dev/sdks/go): Idiomatic Go with generics
- [Ruby](https://docs.strait.dev/sdks/ruby): Faraday-based client for Ruby 3.1+
- [Rust](https://docs.strait.dev/sdks/rust): Async/await with builder pattern

## Use Cases

- **Payment processing** — Schedule and retry payment batches with idempotency keys and concurrency limits.
- **Data pipelines** — Build ETL workflows with step dependencies, approval gates, and error handling.
- **Notification systems** — Fan out emails, push notifications, and webhooks with rate limiting and dead letter recovery.
- **CI/CD automation** — Trigger deployments, run tests, and manage release pipelines with atomic rollbacks.
- **Scheduled reports** — Generate and deliver reports on cron schedules with timezone support.
